title: Data sharing between the National Careers Service and Jobcentre Plus
body: "This guidance supports a data sharing agreement established between the Department for Education and the Department for Work and Pensions in relation to the National Careers Service and Jobcentre Plus.  The guidance is for National Careers Service:   prime contractors sub-contractors working with Jobcentre Plus careers advisers   "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
